title: Interim Assistant Superintendent for Curriculum and Instruction
notes: Rural Oneida County CSD. District has an Interim Assistant Superintendent for Curriculum & Instruction position listed on staff page; named contact not publicly surfaced. Long-time Supt Dr. Ravo Root retired in 2025; interim leadership in place. PK-12; CPSE/UPK page active. Curriculum: Capturing Kids' Hearts character ed. Recommend confirming named contact via camdenschools.org/staff.

district: CLEVELAND HILL UNION FREE SCHOOL DISTRICT
title: Superintendent of Schools
notes: Small single-campus UFSD in Cheektowaga (Erie County), ~1,365 students. UPK housed in Cleveland Hill Elementary. No dedicated ECE director; superintendent is the right point. Email pattern inferred from district format (e.g., mpascual@clevehill.org confirmed).

district: EAST AURORA UNION FREE SCHOOL DISTRICT
title: Director of Curriculum and Instruction
notes: UPK-12 UFSD ~1,750 students in Erie County. Lyons started Aug 2021; oversees curriculum incl. UPK (3 classrooms run in partnership with East Aurora Community Nursery). Email format first-initial + lastname @eastauroraschools.org typical (eak12.org also used).

title: Assistant Superintendent for Instruction
notes: Suburban Onondaga County CSD. UPK curriculum confirmed: Teaching Strategies Creative Curriculum + Heggerty + Second Step. Superintendent: Dr. Magda Parvey. Asst Supt Instruction oversees UPK and elementary curriculum.

title: Superintendent of Schools
notes: Small rural Washington County CSD, single-campus PK-12. Elementary principal: Paul Jenkins (interim). District runs PK screening. No dedicated ECE director; supt is right point.

title: Superintendent of Schools
notes: Small CSD in Wayne County; Richard Mann Elementary serves K-5. Coordinator of Curriculum & Instruction (Intern) Elyse Youngman listed but interim/intern role. Supt is the primary ECE decision-maker.

district: GEORGE JUNIOR REPUBLIC UNION FREE SCHOOL DISTRICT
title: Superintendent of Schools
notes: Special Act UFSD in Freeville (Tompkins County) serving residential students of William George Agency. ~91 students. Recent supt vacancy posted via Castallo & Silky (NYSCOSS). No public-facing named supt currently confirmed for 2025-26. Not a typical ECE prospect (residential serv pop). Confirm leadership via gjrufsd.org/staff-directory.

title: Director of Curriculum
notes: Fulton County small city district. Lais listed as Director of Secondary Curriculum; district may have separate elementary curriculum lead. Four elementary schools, three with PreK (Kingsborough excluded). Tina Avery-Knapp handles CPSE/PreK-5 student support services billing. Recommend Lais as initial contact; confirm elementary-side curriculum owner.

title: Acting Superintendent of Schools
notes: Special Act UFSD in Hastings-on-Hudson (Westchester County) serving emotionally/learning disabled K-12 students at the Graham School (~300 students). Not a typical ECE prospect. Acting Supt is the right point.

title: Superintendent of Schools
notes: Small Madison County CSD. Bowers is current supt; board is conducting search for new supt to start ~July 1, 2026 (Madison-Oneida BOCES facilitating). PreK teacher Jennifer Briggs on staff. Math curriculum: Eureka Squared. PK-12 single building.

title: Superintendent / Elementary Principal / Transportation Supervisor
notes: Very small rural Lewis County CSD. Finster wears three hats: supt, elementary principal, and transportation supervisor. Single point of contact for ECE decisions.

title: Assistant Superintendent for Curriculum, Instruction & Assessment
notes: Westchester County CSD in Montrose. Scollins began July 1, 2025; M.Ed Curriculum & Teaching from Teachers College. Prior 13 yrs at Croton-Harmon. Email pattern inferred (district uses first initial + lastname @henhudschools.org).

title: Principal, Franklin Early Childhood Center
notes: Nassau County (Long Island) UFSD ~4,400 students PK-12. Franklin ECC is the dedicated PK building. Montellese replaced Lorraine Smyth (now Asst Supt). Asst Supt Curriculum, Instruction & Innovation: Dr. Patrick Fogarty (pfogarty@hewlett-woodmere.net) - good secondary contact.

title: Superintendent of Schools
notes: Small rural Cattaraugus County PK-12 single-building CSD. Giannicchi appointed 2023, confirmed 2024-present. Email pattern inferred from district domain.

title: Superintendent of Schools
notes: Small Ontario County rural CSD ~576 students PK-12. Includes PreK program. No dedicated ECE staff; supt is the right contact.

title: Director of Curriculum & Professional Learning
notes: Chemung County CSD. Supt: Dr. Tom Douglas; Asst Supt: Anthony Gill (agill@horseheadsdistrict.com). Owen owns curriculum & PL portfolio incl. PK. Email pattern confirmed via Gill's listing.

title: Superintendent / Principal
notes: Tiny Hamilton County rural K-12 single-building CSD in the Adirondacks. Mulvey serves as both supt and principal. Email format is [lastname][first_initial]@ilcsd.org (verified pattern via RocketReach/ZoomInfo).

district: ISLAND TREES UNION FREE SCHOOL DISTRICT
title: Superintendent of Schools

notes: Small Steuben County rural CSD. Supt: Jason Oliver (joliver@jtcsd.org, 607-792-3690). Elementary building (Troupsburg) serves PreK-6 under McCaffrey. Either contact appropriate; principal owns building-level PK.

title: Director of Elementary Instruction, Assessment, and Family Engagement

title: Assistant Superintendent for Curriculum and Instruction

title: Superintendent of Schools
notes: Small Essex County CSD in the Adirondacks. Asst Supt Business: Dana Wood. District references Curriculum & Instruction dept but no named director surfaced; supt is right starting point. Email pattern: first initial + lastname @lpcsd.org.

title: Assistant Superintendent for Curriculum and Instruction
notes: Large Nassau County (Long Island) UFSD. UPK runs via partnership w/ community partner Tender Garden. Supt: Todd Winch. District has multiple asst supts; Zirogiannis owns C&I.

title: Elementary Principal

title: Superintendent of Schools

district: VALLEY STREAM CENTRAL HIGH SCHOOL DISTRICT
